de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class Recoder2KeYTypeConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Recoder2KeYTypeConverter

  • public class Recoder2KeYTypeConverter
extends Object
    provide means to convert recoder types to the corresponding KeY type structures. Results are stored in a HashMap so that subsequent queries will retrieve the same result. The main method is: get
    Since:
    jul-07
    Author:
    mattias ulbrich

    • Method Detail

      • lookupInCache

        private KeYJavaType lookupInCache(Type t)

        private void storeInCache(Type t,
                          KeYJavaType kjt)

      • getServiceConfiguration

        private ServiceConfiguration getServiceConfiguration()

      • getRecoder2KeYConverter

        private Recoder2KeYConverter getRecoder2KeYConverter()
        get the corresponding Recoder2KeYConverter object of this type converter. use the Recoder2KeY object for this
        Returns:
        not null

      • getKeYJavaType

        public KeYJavaType getKeYJavaType(String typeName)
        return the corresponding KeY JavaType for a recoder type. Return the cached value if present - otherwise create a new type. Store this in the cache. This method retrieves the recoder nameinfo and queries it for the type for typeName and passes this result to getKeYJavaType(Type)
        Parameters:
        typeName - name of a type to be converted
        Returns:
        the KJT for the string representation.
        See Also:
        getKeYJavaType(Type)

      • getKeYJavaType

        public KeYJavaType getKeYJavaType(Type t)
        return the corresponding KeY JavaType for a recoder type. Returned the cached value if present - otherwise create a new type.
        Parameters:
        t - type to be converted, may be null
        Returns:
        null iff t == null, otherwise a keytype.

      • addKeYJavaType

        private void addKeYJavaType(Type t,
                            Sort s)

      • directSuperSorts

        private ImmutableSet<Sort> directSuperSorts(ClassType classType)
        get all direct super sorts of a class type (not transitive)
        Parameters:
        classType - type to examine, not null
        Returns:
        a freshly created set of sorts

      • isObject

        private boolean isObject(ClassType ct)
        is the full name of this type "java.lang.Object" or the short name "Object"
        Parameters:
        ct - the type to be checked, not null
        Returns:
        true iff the name is Object

      • createObjectSort

        private Sort createObjectSort(ClassType ct,
                              ImmutableSet<Sort> supers)
        create a sort out of a recoder class
        Parameters:
        ct - classtype to create for, not null
        supers - the set of (direct?) super-sorts
        Returns:
        a freshly created Sort object

        arrayType -
        Returns:
        the ArrayDeclaration of the given type

      • createSuperArrayType

        private FieldDeclaration createSuperArrayType()
        creates a super type for array types. creates the field declaration for the public final integer field length

      • addImplicitArrayMembers

        private void addImplicitArrayMembers(ExtList members,
                                     KeYJavaType parent,
                                     KeYJavaType baseType,
                                     ProgramVariable len)
        Adds several implicit fields and methods to given list of members.
        Parameters:
        members - an ExtList with the members of parent
        parent - the KeYJavaType of the array to be enriched by its implicit members
        baseType - the KeYJavaType of the parent's element type

      • filterField

        private ImmutableList<Field> filterField(FieldDeclaration field)
        extracts all fields out of fielddeclaration
        Parameters:
        field - the FieldDeclaration of which the field specifications have to be extracted
        Returns:
        a IList the includes all field specifications found int the field declaration of the given list

      • filterField

        private ImmutableList<Field> filterField(ExtList list)
        extracts all field specifications out of the given list. Therefore it descends into field declarations.
        Parameters:
        list - the ExtList with the members of a type declaration
        Returns:
        a IList the includes all field specifications found int the field declaration of the given list
